meta.title: Sean Hase | Massage Therapy
meta.description: Book a massage session with Sean Hase, a massage therapy student training to become a Registered Massage Therapist in BC.

hero.headline: Feel better. Move better.
hero.subhead: Hands-on massage therapy from a dedicated student therapist, currently completing his training to become a Registered Massage Therapist.

about.heading: About Sean
about.body:
Hi, I'm Sean. I'm currently studying to become a Registered Massage Therapist, building on hands-on experience in performance and rehabilitation settings.

I care about helping people move well, recover faster, and feel at home in their bodies. Every session starts with a conversation about what you need that day, and ends with simple things you can do on your own.

Outside the clinic you'll find me training, getting outside, and learning everything I can about how the body works.
about.imageAlt: Sean Hase smiling in a black t-shirt

services.heading: What to expect
services.intro: Sessions are tailored to you. Here are the most common focuses:

items.title: Relaxation massage
items.desc: Slow down, breathe, and let your nervous system reset. Ideal when stress lives in your shoulders.

items.title: Sport and training recovery
items.desc: Targeted work for tight hips, heavy legs, and overworked backs. Built around your training schedule.

items.title: Focused problem areas
items.desc: Neck, jaw, low back, or that one spot that never lets go. We spend the whole session where it counts.

services.note: Student practice sessions. I am not yet a Registered Massage Therapist; sessions are part of my supervised training practice.

booking.heading: Book a session
booking.intro: Pick a day and time that works for you. You will get an instant confirmation with everything you need.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.intro: Questions before you book? Send me a note and I will get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: Massage therapy with care, in training to serve you better.
